options.responseData: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: $('Patch Chunk').first().json.ok || false, chunk_id: $('Build Payload').first().json.chunk_id, latency_ms: $('Build Payload').first().json.latency_ms || null }) }}

nodes.name: Classify Webhook (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. POST /webhook/transcript/classify body: { chunk_id }. Target end-to-end latency <1.5s so the dashboard UI stays live. Publishes to Supabase Realtime and fires the script suggester on trigger intents.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 300, temperature: 0.1, system: $json.system_prompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.user_prompt }] }) }}

nodes.name: Claude Haiku Classify
nodes.notes: TODO: Bind 'Anthropic API' credential. 2.5s hard timeout (budget is <1.5s typical; timeout guards tail latency). Fallback leaves values at 'unknown'/'neutral' to preserve flow.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ sentiment: $json.sentiment, sentiment_score: $json.sentiment_score, detected_intent: $json.intent, detected_topics: $json.topics, classified_at: new Date().toISOString(), classifier_model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', classifier_latency_ms: $json.latency_ms }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ chunk_id: $('Parse Claude').first().json.chunk_id, call_id: $('Parse Claude').first().json.call_id, agent_id: $('Parse Claude').first().json.agent_id, intent: $('Parse Claude').first().json.intent, sentiment: $('Parse Claude').first().json.sentiment }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ node_name: 'transcript_classifier_realtime', error_code: $('Parse Claude').first().json.latency_high ? 'REALTIME_LATENCY_HIGH' : 'TRANSCRIPT_PROCESSING_FAILED', error_message: 'chunk ' + $('Parse Claude').first().json.chunk_id + ' latency_ms=' + $('Parse Claude').first().json.latency_ms, severity: 'warning', created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.name: Log Latency (if high)
nodes.notes: Only writes a scan_errors row when latency_high=true. Keeps the error log quiet during normal operation.
